payload.hero_description: Amity Online MBA in Data Science
payload.meta_description: Amity Online MBA in Data Science
payload.about_content:
MBA in Data Science by Amity Online is a full-fledged online learning program delivered through a 100% online learning platform. The main objective of the MBA in data science at Amity University Online is to assist students in developing their skills to transform data into business insights. Amity University Online offers various tools along with the course to guide students in becoming professionals in the data science industry.

The MBA in Data Science by Amity Online is ranked by QS in India with expertise in the development of leadership skills essential for the 21st century. The program is ideal for students and working professionals with its remote/virtual learning facility. As per the latest reports, the data science industry has increased by 46% in employability, making an online MBA in data science at Amity University Online a perfect postgraduation degree for every student willing to acquire an MBA qualification.
payload.placement_stat_1: As per the latest reports, the data science industry has increased by 46% in employability, making an online MBA in data science at Amity University Online a perfect postgraduation degree for every student willing to acquire an MBA qualification.

highlights.item: A 24 month interest-free easy EMI facility is offered under the Amity online MBA program as financial aid.
Amity University Online is among the top B schools in India and all of its abroad and Indian campuses are interconnected through a highly secure pirate network of their own.
Students enrolled in the Amity Online MBA can access the last-minute revision classes offered at all Amity University campuses.
The Amity University online MBA placement assistance conducts online placement drives every fortnight.
Amity University Online is among the most renowned private universities and its vast network of notable alumni includes  Kunal Khemu, Disha Patani, Himansh Kohli, Urfi Javed, etc.

payload.eligibility_content:
Students willing to enroll in the Amity Online MBA are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria of the program along with the admission requirements mentioned below:

  • The applicant must have completed a 10+2 formal educational qualification from a recognized board of education.
  • Along with the 12 years of formal education, a bachelor’s degree in any domain is required from a valid and recognized university.
  • The applicant must be familiar with and have an intermediate understanding of the English language.

fee_plans.Amity Online MBA in Data Science Syllabu: Managerial EconomicsStatistics for ManagementProfessional communicationAccounting for ManagersMarketing Management
fee_plans.col_1: Legal Aspects of BusinessBusiness Research MethodsFinancial ManagementHuman Resource ManagementConflict Resolution and Management

fee_plans.Amity Online MBA in Data Science Syllabu: Analytics for decision-makingData EngineeringData Visualization and EDAIntroduction to Data ScienceMinor ProjectProfessional EthicsStrategic Management
fee_plans.col_1: Advance Deep LearningDigital MarketingMajor ProjectManagement in Action - Social Economic and Ethical IssuesSupervised and Unsupervised Machine Learning

payload.admission_steps:
Working professionals or students who are willing to pursue an online MBA program must follow the below-listed steps involved in the Amity online admission process:

Step 1. Select the online MBA program along with the best-suited specialization as per your career goals.

Step 2. Complete the application form on Amity University Online's official website by providing personal information.

Step 3. Pay the program fee using your chosen payment mode and fee plan.

Step 4. Once the application form is completely filled, submit it and complete the registration process.

Step 5. Once the admission is confirmed, Amity Online will share the enrollment details.
payload.syllabus_content:
The MBA in data science subjects​ at Amity University Online is industry-specific and offers dedicated career goals to students. The Amity Online MBA in Data Science syllabus enhances business intelligence, machine learning, database management, and other relevant skills among the students.

A detailed Amity Online MBA in Data Science syllabus is listed below for a better course overview:

Amity Online MBA in Data Science Syllabus

Year I

Semester I

Semester II

  • Managerial Economics
  • Statistics for Management
  • Professional communication
  • Accounting for Managers
  • Marketing Management
  • Legal Aspects of Business
  • Business Research Methods
  • Financial Management
  • Human Resource Management
  • Conflict Resolution and Management

Year II

Semester III

Semester IV

  • Analytics for decision-making
  • Data Engineering
  • Data Visualization and EDA
  • Introduction to Data Science
  • Minor Project
  • Professional Ethics
  • Strategic Management
  • Advance Deep Learning
  • Digital Marketing
  • Major Project
  • Management in Action - Social Economic and Ethical Issues
  • Supervised and Unsupervised Machine Learning
payload.exam_content:
The Amity Online MBA in Data Science follows the exact similar examination pattern to other specializations offered under an online MBA. The examination pattern includes internal assessments that carry 30% weightage of the total marks, whereas the term-end examinations carry 70% of the overall marks.

Both components are designed to evaluate the overall theoretical knowledge and practical experience acquired by students during their academic journey at Amity University Online.
payload.placement_content:
To offer better career opportunities to students enrolled in the Amity online MBA course, the university offers a dedicated career coach who guides students throughout their academic journey. The dedicated Amity Online placement cell conducts live virtual job fairs to help them build a successful career.

Meanwhile, Amity University Online provides resume-building, interview preparation, and profile-building services to the students. Among the 500+ active hiring partners of the Amity Online are:

  • Zomato
  • Bewakoof
  • OpexAI
  • Factspan
  • Happay
  • Sears Holdings

faqs.question: How is the learning experience in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: As per the student's reviews, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science is up to the mark with the data visualization, strategic planning, regression modelling, and other learning outcomes of the program.

faqs.question: What kind of technical skills will I gain in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Statistical testing, diverse statistical tool proficiency, and other technical skills, along with expertise in MySQL, Hadoop, R, Python, and other tools, are included in the technical skills gained by a student enrolled in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science.

faqs.question: Can I work while pursuing the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science is specially designed to perfectly fit the busy schedule of working professionals and allow them to acquire a postgraduate degree without quitting their jobs.

faqs.question: Are there live sessions or interactions with faculty in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science offers live classes with faculty interaction, allowing students to maintain a strong academic record.

reviews.item: My experience with amity online MBA was nothing less than a roller coaster ride for me as I was among the covid batch but the univeristy was very supportive and I enjoyed it.
Being a working professional enrolling in an online MBA is a challenge but amity online assisted me at every stage of my academic journey. Kudos to them.
The amity online mba faculty members are very friendly and helped in scoring good marks in a short span of time.
Everything is okay about amity university online but there are a few areas of improvement but everything seems nice to me. I recommend it to others too.

payload.about_content:
The Amity University Online MBA program is a 2 year postgraduate degree program designed by globally renowned and experienced industry experts. The Amity Online MBA is a perfect blend of theoretical and practical approaches, essential for a candidate aspiring to build a successful and prominent career in the business world.

The Amity Online University MBA program is QS ranked, making it a globally prominent B-school. The Online MBA at Amity University Online is highly flexible, following the motto of study anytime, anywhere. This flexibility motivates working-class students to pursue higher education without quitting their jobs.

To make candidates industry-ready professionals the curriculum and learning methodology of the Amity University Online MBA are crafted by considering the standards of the global market. For a better grasp of core subjects in the preferred domains of the students, the Amity Online MBA is offered in 18 diverse specializations that are integrated with real-world projects.

There are plenty of benefits to choosing the Amity University Online MBA program such as top-notch international faculty, a futuristic learning approach with AI-professor AMI, career services & placement assistance, and so on. To offer world-class education quality, students are offered access to the library and programming labs on the campus as well.
payload.about_heading: About Amity University Online MBA Course
payload.placement_stat_1: There are plenty of benefits to choosing the Amity University Online MBA program such as top-notch international faculty, a futuristic learning approach with AI-professor AMI, career services & placement assistance, and so on.

World Education Services accreditation in Canada.
Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC) accreditation.
Accredited with an “A+” grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC).
All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) accreditation.
Ranks #22 under the universities category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).
First private university in India to become a prominent member of the Digital Education Council.

payload.syllabus_content:
The curriculum of Amity University Online MBA program is industry-oriented which makes the core subjects of the initial 2 semesters the same for each specialization and the choice for preferred subjects is given under the last 2 semesters. To give a detailed and brief overview of the Amity Online MBA program, the syllabus of the general Online MBA is listed below:

Semester I

Semester II

  • Marketing Management
  • Managerial Economics
  • Statistics for Management
  • Professional communication
  • Accounting for Managers
  • Legal Aspects of Business
  • Business Research Methods
  • Financial Management
  • Human Resource Management
  • Conflict Resolution and Management

Semester III

Semester IV

  • Strategic Management
  • Minor Project
  • Professional Ethics
  • Specialization Elective 1
  • Specialization Elective 2
  • Specialization Elective 3
  • Specialization Elective 4
  • Major Project
  • Management in Action Social Economic and Ethical Issues
  • Digital Marketing
  • Specialization Elective 1
  • Specialization Elective 2
payload.placement_content:
To ensure the professional growth of every individual enrolled at the Amity University Online MBA program, the placement support facility has 500+ hiring partners offering 3000+ job opportunities that cover every industry and domain. To make students compatible with the global competitive market and guide them in developing the skills and abilities required to match global standards, Amity Online MBA includes multiple career services such as resume-building workshops, interview preparation, industry mentorship, etc.

The major active hiring partners of Amity University Online that hire Online MBA graduates include:

  • IBM
  • Microsoft
  • SBi
  • HDFC
  • Nokia
  • Paytm
  • KPMG
  • Wipro

faqs.question: What is the Amity University Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: The entire 2 year Amity University Online MBA fee is INR 1,99,000/- without incurring any financial aid.

faqs.question: What is the ranking of Amity University Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Amity University Online ranks #35 under the universities category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).

faqs.question: Does Amity Online provide placement?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Online MBA placement support offers an enormous number of hiring partners i.e. 500+ active partners.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to the Amity Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you have scored a minimum of 40% aggregate marks in graduation then you can seek direct admission under the Amity Online MBA program.

faqs.question: What career opportunities can I expect after completing the Amity Online MBA?
faqs.answer: A student is entitled to opt for multiple job opportunities after completing the Amity Online MBA depending on the specialization chosen by them.

faqs.question: How is the Amity University Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: Amity University Online MBA is an ideal choice for students and working professionals as Amity University Online is among the top B Schools.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the Amity University Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: You can apply directly for the Amity University Online MBA through its official website.

faqs.question: What are the requirements to join the Amity Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: The applicant must have completed a valid bachelor’s degree with a 10+2 formal education to join the Amity Online MBA program.

unmapped_sections: Pros of the Amity University Online:

payload.about_content:
Amity University is situated in Noida (Uttar Pradesh) and was established in 2005, whereas its online learning constituent, Amity University Online, received approval from UGC in 2018. The Amity University Online offers various undergraduate and postgraduate degree programs in a plethora of specializations to assist students in opting for the right program that aligns with their future objectives and preferences.

The Amity University holds 30+ years of excellence with 89K+ learners across its vast academic network. Amity University Online offers 80+ online learning programs and specializations. The online degree programs were offered at Amity University Online with the sole objective of offering flexibility to working professionals and students who had taken on responsibilities at an early age.

Amity University Online offers diverse learning media, including e-books, print and audiobooks, and virtual lectures, for a complete online learning experience. To make students aligned and focused with the program, there are dedicated academic advisors who guide students at every professional step throughout their academic journey. Amity University Online has a vast and strong alumni network of 250,000+ global learners that includes some renowned personalities such as Disha Patani, Urfi Javed, Himansh Kohli, Kunal Khemu, etc.

There are various UG and PG programs at Amity University online to opt for, but the Amity University Online MBA and Amity University Online BBA are among the most popular programs as they fall under the top UG and QS ranked programs, respectively. The Amity University Online degree is globally accepted and recognized, which ensures the success of students in the global competitive market.
payload.why_choose_content:
• The Amity University Online degree program includes AI-Professor AMI 3.0 i.e. powered by Chat-GPT and Open AI-driven technology, to offer a futuristic online learning environment.
  • Despite being an online learning program, students can easily build a direct bond with their peers and faculty members via on-campus orientation and activities conducted by Amity University Online.
  • To ensure a hassle-free professional career from the beginning, there are multiple career services offered by Amity University Online.
  • The online degree programs of Amity University Online are full-fledged online programs and require zero physical visits to campus.
  • The Amity University Online MBA is ranked by QS as the only online MBA in India.
  • Amity University Online is the only Indian university that offers doorstep delivery of books for online learning programs.
  • Every online program offered at Amity University Online is placement-assisted and the university has 450+ global hiring partners.
  • The Amity University Online has a Metaverse Campus, where students can discover the boundless contingency of the Amity Campus experience.

accreditations.item: Approval for online degrees by the University Grants Commission (UGC).
World Education Services (WES) accreditation in Canada.
Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC) accreditation.
Accredited with an “A+” grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC).
All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) accreditation.
Ranks #22 under the university category, #37 under the overall category, and #49 under the management category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).
First private university in India to become a prominent member of the Digital Education Council.

admission_steps.item: Prior to enrolling in Amity University Online Login, visit the official website of Amity University Online and go through the eligibility criteria of your preferred program and its specialization.
Students are advised to cross-check their submitted information to avoid any discrepancies or misinformation, or the application will be rejected.

payload.exam_content: The examinations at Amity University Online are conducted through a remote online proctoring system that allows flexibility in taking exams from any corner of the world. The examination process usually depends on the online program chosen by the student; meanwhile, the evaluation of the overall performance of students is calculated via a combination of quizzes, projects, and assignments conducted throughout the academic journey of the student.

faculty_members.item: MBA from the University of Texas

payload.placement_content:
The Amity University Online has a dedicated placement cell that remains active throughout the academic year, and in the meantime, it ensures that every student has acquired the relevant skills and abilities to excel in the global competitive market. To guide students in developing hands-on skills that best fit their chosen industry, it offers 100% placement assistance and a range of career services, including resume-building workshops, virtual job-search support, career counselling, internships, and industry mentorship.

The next-gen career services platform of Amity Online provides the following services:

  • AI-powered resume builder
  • Relevant job mapping via AI tools
  • Human-AI personality assessment
  • Mock video interview
  • Skill analysis
  • Personality test
  • Application tracker
  • Code quest

There are 450+ active hiring partners of Amity University Online, a few of them are mentioned below:

  • MetLif
  • Samsung
  • Nokia
  • IBM
  • Google
  • Genpact
  • Spicejet
  • Microsoft, etc

faqs.question: Is the Amity online degree valid?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity University Online degree is accredited and recognized by WES, UGC, NAAC A+, and AICTE, making it completely valid.

faqs.question: How are Amity online exams conducted?
faqs.answer: The examinations for Amity Online are conducted through a remote online proctoring system.

faqs.question: Is an Amity online degree valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: A degree from Amity Online is completely valid for private and government jobs in India and abroad.

faqs.question: Does Amity University Online provide 100% placement?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Online has partnered with 450+ leading MNCs and business corporations that annually recruit students from the university through virtual placement drives, and claims 100% placement with AI-powered career support.

faqs.question: Is the Amity Online degree valid abroad?
faqs.answer: With the WASC and WES approvals, the Amity Online degree is highly credible and valid abroad.

faqs.question: Is Amity's online admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Online has started accepting applications for the academic session of 2026.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to Amity University Online?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website and fill out the Amity University Online form to gain Amity University Online admission..

faqs.question: What is the step-by-step process for the Amity University Online application?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website > Click on Amity University Online login > Select Amity University Online Admission Course > Fill out the Amity University Online form > Pay the required fee > Receive confirmation from the university end.

reviews.item: I enrolled in the online BBA program at Amity Online and it is quite decent. The course content is good, but sometimes there are technical issues during online class

Overall, I had an amazing time at Amity Online their faculty members are supportive and curriculum easily accessible, but there are a few areas for improvement and so far the university has overcome majority of them.
My friend suggested me amity for online MBA and I was worried about my career but I got a decent placement and completely satisfied with the university. HIGHLY RECOMMEND.
Last year I completed my online BA from AMity Online and the best thing I liked about it is their faculty members. I am still in contact with them and they helped me a lot during my graduation.
